overview.art_style: Minimalist neon-geometric with smooth particle effects
overview.core_pitch: A grid-based block puzzle where players place custom polyomino pieces to clear lines, but with two genre-defining twists: NEXUS LINKS (connected block chains that trigger cascading explosions across non-adjacent lines) and GRAVITY SHIFT (rotating the board's gravity direction mid-game to reshape the playing field).

unique_mechanics.name: NEXUS LINKS
unique_mechanics.description: Certain blocks have colored energy connectors on their edges. When two or more matching connectors touch (even diagonally), they form a Nexus Link. Clearing any line containing a linked block also destroys ALL other blocks in that link chain, regardless of their position on the board. This creates explosive chain reactions across the entire grid and rewards strategic placement of linked pieces.

unique_mechanics.name: GRAVITY SHIFT
unique_mechanics.description: Every 30 seconds (or on-demand via a charged ability), the player can rotate the board's gravity 90 degrees (left, right, or flip). All unsupported blocks fall in the new gravity direction, potentially completing new lines and triggering cascading clears. This adds a spatial reasoning layer completely absent from traditional block puzzlers.

modes.name: Classic Endless
modes.subtitle: Survive the Grid
modes.description: Place pieces on a 9x9 grid to clear full rows and columns. The game ends when no available piece can be placed. No time pressure — pure strategy.
rules: Player receives 3 random pieces at a time in a tray
All 3 must be placed before a new set of 3 is drawn
Clearing a full row OR column removes those blocks and awards points
Nexus Links activate when lines containing linked blocks are cleared
Gravity Shift charges every 45 seconds; player can activate it at will
Game ends when any piece in the current tray cannot fit on the board
modes.win_condition: Survive as long as possible; maximize score

scoring.gravity_shift_clears: 2x multiplier on any lines cleared within 2 seconds of a shift

modes.difficulty_curve: Piece pool starts with simpler shapes (3-4 cells); after every 2000 points, larger/more complex shapes are introduced. Nexus Link frequency increases over time.

modes.name: Puzzle Challenge
modes.subtitle: Think. Solve. Master.
modes.description: Pre-designed boards with specific block configurations already placed. The player receives a fixed set of pieces and must clear the board (or reach a target) in the minimum number of moves.
rules: Board starts with a pre-set configuration of blocks
Player receives a fixed, ordered set of pieces (no randomness)
Goal: clear all highlighted target cells using the fewest placements
Star rating: 3 stars = minimum moves, 2 stars = minimum+1, 1 star = minimum+2
Some puzzles require using Gravity Shift (provided as a one-time ability)
Some puzzles feature locked cells that cannot be covered
Nexus Links are pre-placed on certain puzzles as key solving mechanics
modes.win_condition: Clear all target cells with the given pieces
modes.level_count: 200 puzzles at launch, grouped into 10 chapters of 20
modes.hints_system: Players can spend 1 Hint Token to reveal optimal placement for one piece. Hint Tokens earned via daily login or purchased.

modes.name: Time Rush
modes.subtitle: 60 Seconds of Chaos
modes.description: An intense 60-second sprint on an 8x8 grid. Pieces auto-generate rapidly. Score as many points as possible before time expires.
rules: 60-second countdown timer
Pieces appear one at a time (no tray) with rapid 1.5-second auto-skip if not placed
Skipped pieces cost -50 points
Clearing lines adds +2 seconds to the timer (max 5 bonus seconds per game)
Gravity Shift is available once, recharges after clearing 3 lines
Nexus Links appear more frequently to enable explosive chain reactions
Board does NOT end the game if full — unplaceable pieces are simply skipped with penalty
Speed bonus: placing a piece within 0.5 seconds of receiving it grants +25 points
modes.win_condition: Maximize score within 60 seconds (+ earned bonus time)
modes.daily_challenge: Each day features a fixed random seed so all players compete on identical piece sequences

pieces.name: Spark
pieces.shape: L-shaped corner (2x2 with one cell missing)

pieces.name: Fang
pieces.shape: Two parallel vertical pairs offset by one

pieces.name: Arch
pieces.note: This is a 7-cell piece visually but only 5 cells are filled (the U outline)

pieces.name: Nexus Core
pieces.shape: 2x2 square with all edges having nexus connectors
pieces.special_property: All 4 blocks have nexus connectors — guaranteed to link with adjacent nexus pieces. The ultimate chain-reaction catalyst.

powerups.name: Void Pulse
powerups.effect: Destroys all blocks in a 3x3 area centered on the chosen cell. Does NOT award line-clear points but frees up critical space.
powerups.activation: Tap to select, then tap target cell on the grid
powerups.earn_method: Granted after clearing 5 lines without using any power-ups

powerups.name: Chrono Freeze
powerups.effect: In Time Rush mode: pauses the timer for 5 seconds. In Classic/Puzzle: allows the player to swap the current piece set for a new random draw (one-time re-roll).
powerups.activation: Tap the power-up button in the HUD
powerups.earn_method: Awarded every 10 player levels OR after achieving a 5x combo

powerups.name: Prism Beam
powerups.effect: Instantly clears one chosen row OR column, awarding full line-clear points. Triggers Nexus Links if any linked blocks are in the cleared line.
powerups.activation: Tap to select, then swipe along the row or column to clear
powerups.earn_method: Rare drop from clearing 3+ lines simultaneously

powerups.name: Gravity Anchor
powerups.icon_description: A golden downward arrow with weight symbol
powerups.effect: After placing a piece, all floating blocks (blocks with empty space below them relative to current gravity) instantly fall and settle. Can trigger unexpected line completions. Essentially forces a gravity settle without changing gravity direction.
powerups.activation: Auto-triggers on placement of the next piece after activation
powerups.earn_method: Unlocked at player level 8; earned by clearing 4 lines in one placement

powerups.name: Nexus Overcharge
powerups.icon_description: A glowing electric-blue chain link icon
powerups.effect: Temporarily (for the next 3 piece placements) ALL blocks placed gain nexus connectors on every edge. Massively increases chain-reaction potential.
powerups.activation: Tap to activate; lasts for 3 placements
powerups.earn_method: Rare reward for triggering a Nexus Link chain of 8+ blocks

combo_system.description: Combos occur when multiple lines are cleared in rapid succession or through chain reactions triggered by Nexus Links and Gravity Shift.

combo_types.name: Multi-Clear
combo_types.trigger: Clear 2+ lines with a single piece placement
combo_types.animation: Screen flash, pieces shatter with radial particle burst, score numbers scale up with golden glow

combo_types.name: Chain Reaction
combo_types.trigger: Nexus Link destruction triggers additional line clears
combo_types.multiplier: Each chain step adds +1.5x to the total (chain 1 = 1.5x, chain 2 = 3x, chain 3 = 4.5x, etc.)
combo_types.animation: Electric arcs travel between linked blocks before they explode; camera slight zoom; bass rumble SFX intensifies with each chain step

combo_types.name: Gravity Cascade
combo_types.trigger: After a Gravity Shift, falling blocks complete 1+ lines
combo_types.multiplier: 2x base for the first cascade clear, +1x for each additional line
combo_types.animation: Blocks fall with motion blur trails; impact particles on landing; shockwave ring on line clear

combo_types.name: Perfect Placement
combo_types.trigger: Place a piece that simultaneously triggers a Multi-Clear AND a Chain Reaction
combo_types.multiplier: All multipliers stack multiplicatively (e.g., 3x Multi-Clear * 1.5x Chain = 4.5x)
combo_types.animation: Full-screen prismatic explosion, controller vibration (mobile haptics), 'PERFECT' text with trailing particles

streak_system.description: Clearing at least one line on consecutive piece placements builds a streak counter.
streak_system.streak_bonus: +10% score per consecutive clear (caps at +100% at 10-streak)
streak_system.streak_break: Placing a piece without clearing any line resets the streak to 0
streak_system.visual_feedback: Streak counter displayed with fire effect; board border glows increasingly bright with streak level

xp_system.description: Players earn XP from all game modes. XP accumulates into player levels 1-50.
xp_system.level_curve: Each level requires (level * 100 + 50) XP. Level 1 = 150 XP, Level 50 = 5050 XP. Total XP to max level: ~131,250
xp_system.prestige: After level 50, players can Prestige (reset to level 1) to earn a unique border frame and +5% permanent XP bonus. Up to 3 Prestige tiers.

level_unlocks.reward: Title: 'Nexus Master' + exclusive animated avatar border

achievements.name: Gravity Defier
achievements.condition: Clear 3 lines with a single Gravity Shift

achievements.name: Nexus Architect
achievements.condition: Destroy 50 blocks in a single chain reaction

monetization.philosophy: Cosmetic-only monetization. No gameplay advantages for purchase. All power-ups and pieces are earnable through play. Paying players look cooler but never play better.

iap_offerings.name: Season Pass
iap_offerings.contents: Premium track with exclusive skins, effects, and bonus Prisms over 30 days

cosmetic_categories.description: Visual reskins for all 12 pieces — changes color, texture, and particle effects
Full board visual overhaul — background, grid lines, cell appearance
Custom animations when lines are cleared
Particle trails when dragging pieces to placement
Borders around player profile picture on leaderboards
Text badges displayed under player name

ad_strategy.interstitial_ads: Shown between games (every 3rd game), skippable after 5 seconds. Removed by No-Ads Pass.
ad_strategy.rewarded_ads: Optional: watch a 30-second ad to earn 50 Coins, 1 Hint Token, or 1 extra Gravity Shift charge. Limited to 5 per day.

anti_pay_to_win_guarantees: Power-ups cannot be purchased directly — only earned through gameplay
All pieces are available to all players from the start (visual skins only)
Hint Tokens are earnable through daily rewards and gameplay
No energy/lives system — unlimited play for all users
Leaderboards are purely skill-based; no purchased boosts

technical_notes.offline_capable: Classic Endless and Puzzle Challenge playable offline; Time Rush requires connection for daily seed sync and leaderboards
technical_notes.save_system: Cloud save via player account; local backup
accessibility: Colorblind mode: distinct shapes/patterns per nexus connector color

first_time_user_experience.step_2: 3-move interactive tutorial: place piece, clear line, see score
first_time_user_experience.step_3: Introduction to Nexus Links via guided placement
first_time_user_experience.step_5: Show progression bar and first reward
first_time_user_experience.step_6: Return to main menu with all modes gradually unlocking

session_end.game_over_screen: Final score + XP earned + level progress bar + 'Play Again' / 'Share' / 'Home'
session_end.new_high_score: Celebration animation + leaderboard position + share prompt

audio_design.music: Lo-fi electronic ambient tracks; tempo increases with streak level

sfx_palette.piece_place: Soft click with tonal variation based on piece size
